allow: Bash(git -C /Users/bradygrapentine/Documents/projects/carelog diff b5725a19ab248a4b3e9bf09649961153edbc4d0e HEAD -- apps/web/app/globals.css apps/web/app/layout.tsx)

hooks.command: cd apps/web && output=$(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1); if [ -n "$output" ]; then echo "[tsc] $output" | head -20; fi
cd apps/web && output=$(npx eslint --cache --quiet . 2>&1 | head -15); if [ -n "$output" ]; then echo "[eslint] $output"; fi

if python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); exit(0 if any(k in fp.lower() for k in ['auth','rls','migration','policy','supabase/tests']) else 1)" 2>/dev/null; then echo '[pgTAP] Auth/RLS file changed — running supabase test db...'; cd /Users/bradygrapentine/Documents/projects/carelog && output=$(supabase test db 2>&1); echo "$output" | tail -20; fi
